$notes.preview_not_in_spec: variantType-preview and variantShredding-preview are not described in the ratified Delta protocol spec. The variantType acceptance PR (delta-io/delta#4096) made substantive changes to writer struct-field requirements relative to the original RFC, so preview-era implementations may differ. Cases for preview feature names record observed behavior rather than spec requirements; expected_outcome reflects our best current understanding.
$notes.variant_schema_requires_feature: The spec requires variantType to be listed in both readerFeatures and writerFeatures when the schema contains variant columns. A variant schema without the feature listed is an explicitly invalid table state, not an ambiguous orphan; failure here is spec-grounded rather than errata.

cases.name: variant_type_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[variantType] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_create_table_1_2_with_variant_schema_fails
cases.description: Creating a (1,2) table with a variant column fails; variantType requires minReaderVersion=3, minWriterVersion=7, and the feature listed in both readerFeatures and writerFeatures.

cases.name: variant_type_create_table_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with a variant column but variantType absent from both feature lists fails; the spec requires the feature to be listed when the schema contains variant columns.

cases.name: variant_type_read_snapshot_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_read_snapshot_3_7_variant_array_column_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType] table with a variant array column succeeds; the spec explicitly shows variant as a valid array element type.

cases.name: variant_type_supported_not_active_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType] table with no variant columns in the schema succeeds.
cases.note: variantType is active only when the schema contains at least one variant column. A table may list the feature without any variant columns.

cases.name: variant_type_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with a variant column but variantType absent from both feature lists fails; the spec requires the feature to be listed when the schema contains variant columns.

cases.name: variant_type_empty_commit_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[variantType] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_empty_commit_supported_not_active_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[variantType] table with no variant columns in the schema succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_empty_commit_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with a variant column but variantType absent from both feature lists fails; the spec requires the feature to be listed when the schema contains variant columns.

cases.name: variant_type_preview_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[variantType-preview] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_preview_read_snapshot_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType-preview] table with a variant column succeeds.

cases.name: variant_type_preview_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_schema_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with a variant column but variantType-preview absent from both feature lists fails.

cases.name: variant_type_preview_and_stable_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[variantType-preview, variantType] table with a variant column succeeds; tables upgraded from preview to stable may carry both feature names.
